name: Nontraditional, Traditional Gefilte Fish (Hl)
recipeIngredient: 2 large onions, unpeeled, cut into wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Arrange onion, celery, and carrot sticks with the entire contents of gefilte fish jars, including broth, in a large rectangular glass baking dish.
3. Sprinkle with garlic powder, black pepper, and paprika.
4. Bake for 1 hour.
5. Remove fish from broth and place on serving dish.
6. Garnish with carrots and celery.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
The fish will look exactly like it did when your grandmother made it.
Yield: 12 servings
Nutritional information per serving: Calories: 114, Protein: 11 grams, Carbohydrates: 13 grams, Fat: 2 grams, Cholesterol: 34 milligrams, Sodium: 612 milligrams.
